name: medium pistol ammo, ball
description: Modern ubiquitous medium pistol ammo, popularized by usage in two wars and almost a century of post-war defensive and duty usage.  'Ball' is an old term for full metal jacketed bullets which offer reduced fouling, better reliability, and slightly improved penetration compared to plain lead.

name: medium pistol ammo, jhp
description: Modern ubiquitous medium pistol ammo, popularized by usage in two wars and almost a century of post-war defensive and duty usage.  Jacketed Hollow Points are defensive/duty projectiles that are more destructive to tissue than plain ball ammunition, and slightly reduce overpenetration concerns.
